# Copilot Instructions for Dental Tourism Clinics India

<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This is a dental tourism website built with React (Create React App) that helps people find dental clinics and dentists in India. The project includes:

## Project Structure
- **Frontend**: React app with Tailwind CSS
- **Backend**: Node.js/Express servers in `backend/` and `dental-backend/` directories
- **Database**: MongoDB (Mongoose models)

## Key Features
- Dental clinic listings and search
- Dentist profiles and specializations
- Appointment booking system
- Virtual consultation
- Diagnostic lab integration
- Pharmacy brands
- Dental tourism packages

## Technologies
- React 18
- Tailwind CSS
- React Router
- Axios for API calls
- Mongoose for MongoDB
- Express.js for backend
- Cloudinary for image uploads

## Coding Guidelines
- Use functional components with hooks
- Follow React best practices
- Use Tailwind CSS for styling
- Implement responsive design
- Use semantic HTML
- Handle errors gracefully
- Optimize images and performance
- Follow SEO best practices

## File Naming Conventions
- Components: PascalCase (e.g., `DentistCard.jsx`)
- Pages: PascalCase (e.g., `HomePage.jsx`)
- Utilities: camelCase (e.g., `apiHelpers.js`)
- CSS classes: Follow Tailwind conventions
